subject: Swift-BAT triggers 1217218-1217222 are not astrophysical
submitter: Simone Dichiara at Pennsylvania State University <sbd5667@psu.edu>
body:
S. Dichiara (PSU) reports on behalf of the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Swift triggers 1217218, 1217221 and 1217222 were caused by a star track loss-of-lock  event, and are not interesting astrophysical events.
